crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest priority task.

codex_auto_fallback_note: Enabled 2026-05-22 as part of Codex pivot v2 task #4 48h selective-enable window. Low-traffic agent (4h heartbeat-only cron cadence). Revert: set to false. Widening to all Codex-runtime agents requires separate orch approval after 48h monitor window.
provider_account_note: 2026-05-27: route RevOps Claude Code work through greg@revopsglobal.com work/team profile; personal Max resets 2026-05-27 11:00 Pacific and should not be the default autonomous lane while depleted.
suppress_restart_telegram_note: 2026-05-27T15:47:52.749Z: Future restarts must not send boot/back-online Telegram messages; Telegram text is reserved for substantive user replies, blockers, decisions, or material status.
